claim_boundary.detached: evidence_commit identifies the commit that last changed the cryptographic publication evidence; truth_subject_commit identifies the transparency-verified subject commit. Consumers must not equate them unless evidence_equals_subject is true.
claim_boundary.repo_local: evidence_commit identifies the commit that last changed the cryptographic publication evidence; truth_subject_commit identifies the transparency-verified subject commit. Consumers must not equate them unless evidence_equals_subject is true.

head_claim_boundary.detached: Current HEAD contains transparency-verified evidence for truth_subject_commit; HEAD is not itself the verified subject.
head_claim_boundary.repo_local: Current HEAD contains transparency-verified evidence for truth_subject_commit; HEAD is not itself the verified subject.

platform_governance_claim_boundary.detached: Current-head workflow governance is fresh, but GitHub branch-protection / ruleset enforcement is not proven on main. Do not claim platform-enforced governance while main_branch_protection_receipt is not PASS.
platform_governance_claim_boundary.repo_local: Current-head workflow governance is fresh, but GitHub branch-protection / ruleset enforcement is not proven on main. Do not claim platform-enforced governance while main_branch_protection_receipt is not PASS.

platform_governance_head_claim_boundary.detached: Current HEAD contains workflow-governance-only evidence for platform_governance_subject_commit; it is not itself freshly governance-proven.
platform_governance_head_claim_boundary.repo_local: Current HEAD contains workflow-governance-only evidence for platform_governance_subject_commit; it is not itself freshly governance-proven.

verifier_boundary: Wave 3 detached verifier proves same-host packaged detached replay only. It does not claim independent hostile replay, public challenge survival, or external confirmation above E1.
